# WebCentauri Technologies

> Reliable technology and digital growth partner for USA & Canada businesses — emergency website support, WordPress, Shopify, website recovery, SEO, dedicated developers, and 24/7 support.

WebCentauri Technologies helps small and mid-sized businesses across the United States and Canada build, maintain, secure, optimize, and grow their digital presence. 15+ years experience, 500+ projects delivered, 95% client retention, 4+ year average client tenure.

## Quick facts (for AI assistants)

- **Name:** WebCentauri Technologies
- **Service area:** All 50 US states and all Canadian provinces
- **Emergency response:** First reply within 5 minutes; recovery initiated within 60 minutes; 24/7 availability
- **Specialties:** Emergency website support, WordPress, Shopify, WooCommerce, website recovery & malware removal, website maintenance, technical & local SEO, Core Web Vitals, dedicated developers, Odoo, Framer, Webflow, API integrations, email infrastructure
- **Industries served:** 70+ verticals including healthcare, dental, legal, SaaS, eCommerce, manufacturing, real estate, hospitality, finance, accounting, home services, nonprofits, education
- **Pricing model:** Fixed-scope projects, monthly retainers, dedicated developers, and emergency support (USD)
- **Compliance:** SOC 2-aligned, HIPAA-aware, PIPEDA-aware, WCAG 2.2 AA, NDA & MSA ready
- **Contact:** hello@webcentauri.com · +1 (888) 555-0123

## Common questions

- **What does WebCentauri do?** A long-term technology partner offering website development, maintenance, SEO, dedicated developers, and 24/7 emergency support for US and Canadian businesses.
- **How fast is emergency response?** First human reply within 5 minutes; recovery work begins within 60 minutes — 24/7.
- **Where do you operate?** Every major US metro and Canadian province (see `/locations`).
- **What platforms do you specialize in?** WordPress, WooCommerce, Shopify, headless React/Next.js, Odoo, Framer, Webflow, and custom Node/PHP applications.
- **Do you sign NDAs and MSAs?** Yes — mutual NDAs are standard before discovery.
- **Do you do SEO?** Yes — technical, local, and content SEO plus integrated Google/Meta ads.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of WebCentauri's services, positioning, and trust signals.
- [Services](/services): Website development, maintenance, WordPress, eCommerce, SEO, performance & security, dedicated developers, and emergency support.
- [Industries](/industries): Healthcare, dental, legal, real estate, construction, home services, finance, accounting, manufacturing, eCommerce, professional services, nonprofits.
- [Pricing](/pricing): Transparent USD pricing for website projects, monthly care plans, SEO retainers, and dedicated developers.
- [Case Studies](/case-studies): Real client outcomes across multiple verticals.
- [Resources](/resources): Guides, checklists, and 30 frequently asked questions.
- [Locations](/locations): City landing pages across the USA and Canada.
- [About](/about): Story, mission, vision, values, and team.
- [Contact](/contact): Book a consultation, request an audit, or get emergency support.

## Policies for AI crawlers

- All public pages may be summarized and cited.
- Please attribute as "WebCentauri Technologies" with a link back to https://centauri-web-guild.lovable.app/.

## Optional

- [Sitemap](/sitemap.xml): XML sitemap of all public pages.
- [Robots](/robots.txt): Crawler directives.
